Data.Val: <DecoratedData xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" MajorRev="1" MinorRev="0" CRC="ToDo"> <Private xsi:type="AoiPrivateData" Guid="91B565D6-A3BB-4EFA-BC53-9FD514BA80FF" ContentType="Routine"> <Attrib /> <Subs /> </Private> <Private xsi:type="AoiPrivateData" Guid="8C954DBF-D716-4AE4-AB2A-9609964D4B10" ContentType="Routine"> <Attrib /> <Subs /> </Private> <Private xsi:type="AoiPrivateData" Guid="04EFC7E4-406E-4C70-BF3B-E2C909A3C850" ContentType="Routine"> <Attrib /> <Subs /> </Private> </DecoratedData>

Parameter.Name: Cfg_Debounce
Parameter.Description: Setpoint for Debounce Timer from HMI

Parameter.Name: OCmd_OoSOn
Parameter.Description: HMI Command to set the OOS Bit

Parameter.Name: OCmd_OoSOff
Parameter.Description: HMI Command to reset the OOS Bit

Parameter.Name: OoS
Parameter.Description: Out of Service Status. Alarms and Shutdowns are disabled if ON.

Parameter.Name: OCmd_ResetAckAll
Parameter.Description: Operator Command to Reset and Acknowledge all Alarms

Parameter.Name: Sts_AlmInh
Parameter.Description: 1=One or more Alarms Shelved or Disabled

Parameter.Name: Val_Notify
Parameter.Description: Highest Alarm prio and ack status this object only (enum)

Parameter.Name: Cfg_HasHiHiAlm
Parameter.Description: 1=High-High Alarm exists and will be checked

Parameter.Name: Cfg_HasHiAlm
Parameter.Description: 1=High Alarm exists and will be checked

Parameter.Name: Cfg_HasLoAlm
Parameter.Description: 1=Low Alarm exists and will be checked

Parameter.Name: Cfg_HasLoLoAlm
Parameter.Description: 1=Low-Low Alarm exists and will be checked

Parameter.Name: Cfg_HasIOFaultAlm
Parameter.Description: 1=Analog Input Failure Alarm exists and will be checked

Parameter.Name: Cfg_IOFaultResetReqd
Parameter.Description: 1=Reset required to clear Analog InputFailure Alarm

Parameter.Name: Cfg_IOFaultAckReqd
Parameter.Description: 1=Acknowledge required for Analog Input Failure Alarm

LocalTag.Name: InRange
LocalTag.Description: Out of Range Bit used in logic

LocalTag.Name: Cfg_PVDecPlcs
LocalTag.Description: Number of Decimal Places in PV
